response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, leadership in AI-agent infrastructure, and exposure to MCP and cloud platforms, but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years in production-grade AI systems, vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph, and his AI experience appears recent and less deep compared to his broader software engineering background.
strengths: Demonstrated leadership in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Extensive experience with TypeScript, cloud (AWS), and full-stack development
Proven track record of mentoring, workshops, and open-source contributions
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production AI systems; most AI work is recent
Missing explicit experience with vector databases, RAG, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph
Limited documentation of data pipeline design or LLM optimization metrics in past roles

key_factors.factor: Lack of proven RAG/vector DB expertise
